feature_hypothesis: An AI assistant that automatically summarises customer support tickets and suggests responses to agents.

personas.first_reaction: This could streamline our support process, but I have concerns about reliability.
objections: Potential inaccuracies in summarization could lead to miscommunication.
Data privacy and security concerns with handling customer information.
personas.key_quote: We need to ensure that any automation doesn't compromise the quality of our customer interactions.

personas.first_reaction: This could save us a lot of time and improve our support efficiency.
objections: We need to ensure it integrates well with our existing tools.
Will this really reduce our workload or just complicate the process?
personas.key_quote: If it helps us respond faster and better, I'm all for it.

personas.first_reaction: This could really speed up my workflow and reduce response times.
objections: I hope it accurately captures the nuances of customer issues.
I worry about over-relying on AI for important interactions.
personas.key_quote: If it simplifies my task and helps me respond faster, I'm all in!

personas.first_reaction: I'm concerned about the potential for data leakage with automated processing of sensitive customer information.
objections: Risk of exposing sensitive customer data.
personas.key_quote: We must prioritize data security and ensure compliance before implementing any AI solutions.

personas.first_reaction: There are potential risks regarding PII and compliance with EU AI Act regulations.
objections: Possible identification of PII in customer tickets
personas.key_quote: We must ensure that customer data is handled in strict compliance with the regulations.

personas.first_reaction: This feature could significantly boost our efficiency in handling customer support tickets.
objections: It needs to maintain accuracy in understanding complex queries.
We need to ensure it doesn't reduce the personal touch in responses.
personas.key_quote: An AI assistant that learns from our interactions will empower us to provide even better service to our customers.
